channel.title: Arka Mondal | Computer System Architecture Lab

item.title: CSArch Lab members attended CSC 2026
item.description: CSArch Lab members attended KIISE Computer System Society Conference 2026 (CSC 2026) held in Pyeongchang, Gangwon-do. Our lab members had a great time as the great researchers on computer system research fields presented keynotes and their research work during the conference.

item.title: CSArch Lab members attended MICRO 2025
item.description: CSArch Lab members attended the 58th IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Microarchitecture (MICRO 2025) held in Seoul, South Korea. Our lab members had a great time actively participating in research discussions and networking with researchers.

item.title: Narae and Arka have joined CSArch Lab
item.description: Narae and Arka have joined CSArch Lab since the Fall semester 2025. We hope they will enjoy adventures in computer architecture research. Welcome!!
